orbit
docs releases ★ GitHub

● multi-agent dashboard

orbit

Manage multiple Claude Code sessions simultaneously.
Real-time feed, persistent history, token tracking.

Star on GitHub ↓ Download for Windows Windows 10+ · MIT · free & open source

what it does

⊙
Multi-session
Run multiple Claude agents in parallel across different projects simultaneously.
▸
Real-time feed
Streaming JSON displayed as structured entries — thinking blocks, tool calls, responses.
◈
Persistent history
SQLite-backed sessions. Close the app, reopen — conversations resume automatically.
$
Cost tracking
Per-session token usage and estimated cost in USD. Always know what each agent is spending.
/
Slash commands
Autocomplete from installed Claude Code plugins. File picker with @ references.
○
Context menu
Right-click sessions to rename, stop, or delete. No digging through menus.
orbit · MIT license · © josefernando
